summary: Sprint 5 Produits backend testing complete. Created /app/backend/tests/test_products_fabsci.py with 39 tests covering CRUD, RBAC + prix_achat masking, stock-status filters, reference auto-increment, soft delete, alertes-stock dashboard endpoint, ISBN lookup via Google Books, and Sprint 1/3/4 regression. Full suite (112 tests across auth, dashboard, clients, produits) passes 100% in ~51s. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: products_module.py: Soft-delete DELETE endpoint should ideally still accept already-deleted resources without re-touching updated_at — currently idempotent because find_one_and_update succeeds. OK.
List endpoint sort is by reference ASC which mirrors insertion order. Good.
_lookup_isbn_google: 8s httpx timeout, gracefully returns None on HTTP error — robust. No mocking required.
alertes-stock uses {$expr: {$lte: [stock_actuel, stock_minimum]}} which is correct but won't use an index. Acceptable for current data volume.
READ_ROLES does NOT include comptable for /api/produits list, while FINANCIAL_ROLES does for prix_achat visibility — intentional per Sprint 2 matrix and verified.
prix_achat default=0 with ge=0 allows zero on create which is fine; commercial users see null regardless of value.
test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md: test_super_admin_valid_token + test_dg_valid_token. Created ephemeral users/sessions for the 6 non-seeded roles (comptable, directeur_commercial, gestionnaire_stock, responsable_magasinier, secretariat, service_logistique), cleaned up at teardown.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data — relied on existing seed_products(35 products, FABS-PRD-0001 stock=3 alerte, FABS-PRD-0028 stock=0 rupture). Test-created products (~14) soft-disabled at teardown; counter at seq=49 post-run (expected). DG role restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 5 fully green. Reference counter for produits is now at seq=49 due to 14 test-created products (all soft-deleted). Next sprints should expect counter > 35 if creating new seeded products via next_product_reference. ISBN lookup test for real ISBN (9782070612758) is lenient — accepts both found=true and found=false to tolerate Google Books rate-limits. Use the role_tokens fixture pattern (token prefix test_token_prd_<role>) for new product RBAC tests; do not reuse client/dashboard prefixes.
